title: 4PCS Square Gift Boxes with Lid for Presents, Black Cardboard Gift Boxes with Raffia and Ribbon,Lid Square Boxes for Birthday,Party,Wedding,Christmas,Anniversary Festival
features: 🎁【Multiple Sizes】The 4-piece gift box set includes a variety of sizes to meet your different packaging needs. You can choose the right black gift boxes according to the size of the items. Small - 3.5*3.5*2.2 inches, Medium - 4.7*4.7*2.3 inches, Large - 5.9*5.9*3.7 inches, Largest - 6.7*6.7*6.1 inches.

🎁【High Quality Material】Our paper gift boxes are made of high quality cardboard with smooth surface texture, strong and durable, and not easily deformed. The webbing is made of polyester flexible material, which highlights the high-end texture of the webbing gift box and can be reused and stored.

🎁【Exquisite Gift Set】 The gift wrap boxes set comes with 50g of black raffia for you to place in the Lid Square box for decoration or filling. You can cut the 22m gold ribbon to a suitable length and tie the ribbon to the lid square box to make your surprise nested gift boxes more beautiful and exquisite.

🎁【Easy to use】Our rectangular cardboard gift boxes with lids require no installation. You can use it directly, put in your gifts and raffia, and tie it with ribbon, which will save your time greatly. These black hat boxes stack on top of each other for easy storage when not in use.

🎁【Wide Application】Our black nesting boxes with lids are perfect for business gifts, parties, graduations, weddings, birthday gifts, anniversaries, Mother's Day, Father's Day, Christmas, Thanksgiving, Valentine's Day and other wrapping gifts occasion.
description: Give your friends and family the best surprise with this black kit gift box! 1. The packaging gift box is filled with raffia, which not only makes the gift more high-end, but also protects the gift from damage, scratches and impacts caused by transportation or rapid movement. 2. For these black nesting gift boxes, just put different gifts into the set box and open the nesting gift box with the lid from top to bottom, allowing the recipient to experience different surprises. 3.4 sizes of nesting boxes with lids can be used for gift packaging, such as shirts, watches, perfumes, clothing accessories, candles, skin care products, jewelry, candies, toys.
